name: Employer offered quick neck injury settlement, should I take it?
description: Wait for lawyer review and full diagnosis.

mainEntity.name: Employer offered quick neck injury settlement, should I take it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Wait for lawyer review and full diagnosis.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, unless lawyer reviews—early offers undervalue future needs.** Don't rush.[5] Key factors: Wait for MMI; know full damages; no final prognosis yet. Common insurer tactic. Hold for fair amount.
